productDisplayName: Nike Men Red Portugal Football Jersey
description: Style NoteDesigned for your training needs, this nike jersey is made of polyester fabric with Dri-Fit technology to offer absolute sweat-free, fresh comfort. Such properties make it ideal not just for training, but playing any sport even on a hot day. Team this with performance shorts and sports shoes, or tracks and floaters for an unparalleled cool look.Product DetailsRed FPF jersey, has a round neck, short sleeves, Nike swoosh on right chest, a Portugal Football Federation applique on left chest and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% recycled polyesterMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and fitRegular fit
